body: Mina, it was great catching up with you at the [Threshold Ventures](threshold-ventures) offsite last week — I've been thinking about our conversation around the grid-edge compute thesis ever since. I wanted to follow up on the two deals you mentioned you're tracking in the distributed inference space, because at least one of them sounds like it could be a strong fit for what [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) is doing at the seed layer this year. If you're open to it, I'd love to get on a quick call this week to compare notes before either of us moves too far down the diligence path independently. There might also be a co-lead structure worth exploring if the valuation lands where you think it will. Let me know what your schedule looks like — I'm pretty flexible Thursday or Friday afternoon.
